name: PLC Reviewer
postCreateCommand: cd /workspaces/plc-reviewer/frontend && npm install && cd /workspaces/plc-reviewer/backend && pip install uv && uv venv && source .venv/bin/activate && uv pip install -r requirements.txt
postStartCommand: cd /workspaces/plc-reviewer/backend && uv venv --clear && uv pip install -r requirements.txt && gh codespace ports visibility 5173:public -c $CODESPACE_NAME 2>/dev/null || true
